name: ai.stompy/stompy
title: Stompy – AI Memory for Claude & MCP Agents
description: Persistent memory system that prevents context loss between AI sessions. Store, search, and recall project knowledge across conversations. Features semantic search, conflict detection, ticket management, and document ingestion. Works with Claude Desktop, VS Code, Cursor, and any MCP-compatible client.

tools.name: lock_context
tools.description: Store content as immutable versioned snapshot for persistent memory

tools.name: context_search
tools.description: Hybrid semantic + keyword search over project contexts

tools.name: ticket_board
tools.description: View ticket board grouped by status

tools.name: detect_conflicts
tools.description: Detect contradictions in project contexts using NLI

tools.name: ingest_document
tools.description: Ingest documents with AI processing and storage

tools.name: project_create
tools.description: Create a new project with isolated storage

tools.name: db_query
tools.description: Read-only SQL queries against project database
